title: Hardening noisy reducer
text: Need to harden noisy transcript reduction on Codex inside Ubuntu 24.04 with Python 3.12 and git; I am checking scripts/agent_blogger.py, tests/test_agent_blogger.py, and agent-blogger.config.yaml.

I want to keep this grounded, so I tried a clean reduce pass first.
```sh
python3 scripts/agent_blogger.py reduce transcripts/noisy.jsonl --config agent-blogger.config.yaml
```
The draft still needs help from README.md and references/configuration.md.

Traceback (most recent call last):
Permission denied while writing scripts/agent_blogger.py
I tried using the last assistant message as the fix, but that did not work. Next I checked `git status --short` and `rg -n "Traceback" scripts/agent_blogger.py`.
The noisy session still mentions tests/test_agent_blogger.py and agent-blogger.config.yaml, but it has not found a real conclusion yet.
ERROR: failed to inspect README.md from the last run
I kept the investigation open because the failed attempt still needs a grounded reducer path.
This is still only evidence gathering, not a final fix.
